layout.Navbar.tsx: Global navigation bar with smooth scroll links.
layout.Footer.tsx: 4-column footer with map links, schedule, and social.

sections.Hero.tsx: Main impactful section above the fold.
sections.Services.tsx: Grid of services (Vet, Pet Shop, Grooming).
sections.Contact.tsx: Lead form and detailed contact info.

ui.Card.tsx: Reusable card component for services and team.

features.WhatsAppBot.tsx: Automated chatbot mock guiding to WhatsApp.

lib.mockData.ts: Structured JSON output for page content and SEO strings.

hooks.useScroll.ts: Custom hook for handling smooth scroll and active sections.

src.index.css: Tailwind entry point and global styles (Apple typography).
